title: The Farewell Speech
description: On pages 15, 16, 17, this part focuses on the farewell plan. Vivi and the crew try to find a way to say goodbye without exposing their bond to the Navy or putting Alabasta in danger.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Farewell Plan sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Crocodile, Vivi, Luffy, Nami, Zoro.
summary: Vivi and the crew try to find a way to say goodbye without exposing their bond to the Navy or putting Alabasta in danger.
